description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a rooftop terrace, featuring a mix of dark gray and wood-textured exterior panels. The front facade is dominated by large, floor-to-ceiling windows and a prominent entryway with a paved walkway flanked by two tall, narrow shrubs. The rooftop terrace is furnished with outdoor seating and planters, partially enclosed by glass railings and a small glass-walled room. The house is surrounded by several coniferous trees, adding greenery and privacy to the property. The side and rear elevations show a more solid wall with fewer windows, emphasizing privacy and insulation. The overall design is sleek, geometric, and emphasizes open, light-filled living spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, wood and dark gray exterior, and a furnished rooftop terrace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, paved walkway, and rooftop terrace with glass railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall with minimal windows and the wood-textured paneling.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rooftop terrace, glass-walled room, and a more private facade with fewer windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the entry path, tall shrubs, and the geometric arrangement of windows and exterior materials.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide glass door, paved walkway, flanked by tall shrubs, and no porch or overhang.
